title: IBM Cloud Pak for Data
introduction: With Cloud Pak for Data you can collect, organize, and analyze your data to generate insights with an extensible, end-to-end platform for governance, analytics, and AI.

links.title: Getting started with IBM Cloud Pak for Data

section_highlights.title: Introducing Cloud Pak for Data v5.2
section_highlights.description: Cloud Pak for Data continues to evolve as a unified framework that lets you connect to your data, govern it, find it, and use it for analysis.

section_highlights.title: Introducing IBM Software Hub v5.2
section_highlights.description: IBM Software Hub v5.2 brings a strong set of technical updates that make it easier to deploy, manage, and monitor IBM’s Data and AI software.
